sidebar.delete_project_confirm: Delete this project? Only the .dive/ folder will be removed. (Your code is preserved.)

stage.banner_all_verified: All steps complete — add another step or finish the session.
stage.banner_select_card: Select a roadmap step to work on.
stage.banner_decomposed: Describe what the agent should do for this step.
stage.banner_instructed_empty: Describe what the agent should do for this step.
stage.banner_instructed: Step ready — the agent will follow your instruction.
stage.banner_rejected: Step needs changes — edit it and try again.
stage.banner_verified: Checked — inspect changes or move to the next step.
stage.gate_no_session: Choose a project and start a session before describing a goal.
stage.gate_no_provider: Connect an AI assistant before planning, roadmap creation, and step execution.
stage.gate_no_cards: Describe your goal and draft a plan before step execution.
stage.gate_no_instruction: Describe what the agent should do for this step.
stage.hint_no_instruction: Tip: describe what this step should do for a sharper result — or just start chatting.

onboarding.title: Connect your AI assistant
onboarding.description: After choosing a project folder, connect the AI assistant DIVE uses to plan, build, and check work.
onboarding.opencode_warning: Beta service · some free models may use data for training
onboarding.error_unauthorized: The key is invalid or lacks permission. ({{message}})
onboarding.error_network: Could not connect because of a network problem. ({{message}})

new_project.title: New project
new_project.description: Choose the folder to work in. DIVE will create `.dive/` inside it.
new_project.browse_unavailable: The folder picker is available in the desktop app.

settings.general_description: Change DIVE's language, theme, and guided help.
settings.guided_help_description: Show step-by-step explanations while you learn DIVE.
settings.ai_connection_title: Connect DIVE to an AI assistant
settings.ai_connection_description: Pick the AI connection DIVE uses for planning, coding, and checks. API keys are stored in the OS keychain.
settings.safety_description: DIVE asks before changing files, running commands, or undoing work.
settings.safety_control_description: File edits and commands wait for an approval card before they run.
settings.safety_blocked_description: Some dangerous commands cannot run even if someone clicks approve.
settings.safety_undo_description: Use Recovery & Undo in the main app to return to a saved checkpoint.
settings.reset_approvals_description: Recommended: forget advanced auto-approval shortcuts when a new session starts.
settings.advanced_description: Optional tools for experienced users. You can ignore this section at first.
settings.auto_approval_description: Advanced shortcut: only safe read tools can be auto-approved. File edits and commands still require manual approval.
settings.auto_approval_hint: Warning and danger tools always stay manual.

chat.empty_no_project_description: Pick the local folder where DIVE will plan, create a roadmap, and run step-by-step coding work.
chat.empty_no_session_description: After your AI connection is ready, describe a goal so DIVE can draft a plan and roadmap.
chat.empty_default_title: Start a session to begin chatting
chat.empty_default_description: Enter a goal or pick a roadmap step
chat.empty_hint: In the sidebar, click + New session to begin

runtime.supervised_tooltip: DIVE runs the agent in a supervised runtime. Every action it wants to take — editing files, running commands — needs your approval first. You stay in control.

tool_call.denied_plan_first: This is expected during planning: file changes and commands wait until you approve a plan.
tool_call.blocked_explain: This command is blocked by the safety policy (§9.2) and cannot run, with or without your approval.

decomposed.label: Waiting
decomposed.summary: Waiting for a task — click a step to start

verified.label: Done
verified.summary: Passed AI review — manual check recommended

rejected.label: Rejected
rejected.summary: Verification rejected — revise the task and retry

roadmap.title: Roadmap

next_action_v2.no_steps: Describe your goal in chat to generate a roadmap.
next_action_v2.pick_step: Select a step to see its details.
next_action_v2.planned: Waiting to start. The agent will pick this up next.
next_action_v2.blocked: This step is blocked. Check dependencies or provider quota, then retry with Resume.
next_action_v2.in_progress: The agent is working on this step.
next_action_v2.review: Review the results, then approve or request changes in chat.
next_action_v2.done: Approved. Move on to the next step.

roadmap.empty_v2_description: Approve a plan in chat to see your roadmap here.

step_detail.title: Step details
step_detail.read_only_note: Read only. Make changes from chat.
step_detail.go_to_chat_hint: Reviews, edits, and approvals happen in chat.

dashboard.title: Plan dashboard
dashboard.detail_draft: Plan draft is waiting for approval.

plan_view.empty_description: Create or approve a plan in chat, then DIVE will map the steps here.

interview.title: Plan interview
interview.goal_hint: Describe what you want to build in natural language.
interview.answer_hint: Answer the latest question. DIVE will ask for specifics when needed.
interview.adjust_failure_seed: Re-open the plan interview for {{title}}. The issue to resolve is: {{reason}}
interview.vague_answer_error: Please be more specific about the audience, scope, success criteria, or constraints.
interview.draft_ready_description: Review the generated plan before approving it.

recovery.hints: If the model response is too long, ask only for a compact plan draft.|If it fails again, split the goal into a smaller scope.

length.title: Plan response was cut off
length.description: The model reached its token limit before finishing the plan JSON. DIVE can ask again using a shorter format.

invalid_json.title: Plan JSON could not be read
invalid_json.description: The model response was not valid JSON or was corrupted. DIVE can retry with a shorter, stricter JSON request.

invalid_plan_shape.title: Plan structure is incomplete
invalid_plan_shape.description: The JSON was readable, but it did not include the goal, intent summary, and steps DIVE needs. DIVE can regenerate a compatible structure.

approval.title: Plan draft
approval.request_changes_placeholder: Describe what should change in this draft...
approval.unresolved_warning: These items are unresolved — consider answering before approving

confirm.title: Add this as a new step?
confirm.description: DIVE can append this request to the approved plan before sending it to chat.

recovery.title: Recovery & Undo
recovery.description: Save a safe point or undo to an earlier checkpoint if a step goes wrong.
recovery.no_checkpoints: No checkpoints found yet. Save a recovery point before risky work.
recovery.open_session: Open a project session to enable recovery.
recovery.restore_confirm_body: DIVE will ask the backend to restore {{checkpoint}}. The checkpoint system creates a pre-restore backup first, but files in your project will change.
recovery.restore_success_description: DIVE restored the project and saved a pre-restore backup.
recovery.explain_failure_prompt:
Explain this failure for {{title}} in beginner-friendly language and suggest the safest next action:
{{reason}}
recovery.rejected_reason: This step was marked as needing changes.

safe.title: Quick safety check
safe.description: This request should only read information. You still stay in control.

warn.title: Review before DIVE changes anything
warn.description: Nothing is applied until you choose Allow. Deny is always safe.

danger.title: High-risk approval required
danger.description: DIVE is asking for a powerful action. It will not run unless you allow it.

summary.files_empty: No specific file path was provided.

command.title: Command to run
command.change_maybe: This command might change files if the program writes to the project. DIVE will show results afterward, but it cannot promise the command is read-only.
command.change_yes: This action is expected to change project files.
command.change_no: This command is not expected to change files.
command.failure_note: If it fails, no approval is reused automatically. DIVE gets the error and can explain it.
command.deny_note: You can deny now and ask DIVE why this command is needed.

patch.title: Patch preview before approval
patch.with_diff: Review the exact before/after file change. Nothing here is applied until you allow it.
patch.missing_diff: A patch preview is not available for this request. Review the file path and raw details before deciding.

safe.label: Safe read
safe.body: This only reads project information. It should not change files or run commands.

warn.label: Needs your approval
warn.body: This may change files. Review the file path and preview before allowing it.

danger.label: Higher risk
danger.body: This can run commands or remove files. DIVE will not continue unless you explicitly allow it.

read_file.title: Read a file
read_file.body: DIVE wants to open this file so it can understand the project before acting.

list_dir.title: List files in a folder
list_dir.body: DIVE wants to see the folder names so it can choose the right next step.

search_files.title: Search project files
search_files.body: DIVE wants to search text in your project. This should not edit anything.

write_file.title: Create or replace a file
write_file.body: DIVE wants to write new content to this file. Review the preview before allowing it.

edit_file.title: Edit part of a file
edit_file.body: DIVE wants to replace matching text in this file. Review the before/after preview.

delete_file.title: Delete a file
delete_file.body: DIVE wants to remove this file from the project. Only allow this if you expected it.

mkdir.title: Create a folder
mkdir.body: DIVE wants to add a folder inside the project.

run_process.title: Run a project command
run_process.body: DIVE wants to run one program in the project folder. It may check, build, install, or generate files depending on the command.

bash.title: Run a shell command
bash.body: DIVE wants to run this through the shell. Shell commands are powerful, so blocked patterns still cannot run even if approved.

default.title: Use {{toolName}}
default.body: DIVE wants to use this tool. Review the details before allowing it.

choices.deny_file_private: Deny if this file should stay private
choices.deny_folder_private: Deny if this folder should stay private
choices.deny_unnecessary_search: Deny if the search is unnecessary
choices.deny_ask_explain: Deny and ask DIVE to explain
choices.deny_ask_safer_change: Deny and ask for a safer change
choices.deny_wrong_location: Deny if the location looks wrong
choices.deny_ask_purpose: Deny and ask what it is for
choices.deny_ask_safer_command: Deny and ask for a safer command
choices.edit_if_wrong: Edit the request if the details look wrong

no_output.title: No code output yet
no_output.description: After a step starts, DIVE will show changed files and diffs here.

blocked_no_output.title: No files were produced because the step is blocked
blocked_no_output.description: Check provider quota or dependencies, then retry from the roadmap Resume action.

toast.tutorial_description: You can change this anytime in Settings > General.
toast.about_description: Desktop app for guiding a local AI coding agent through plan, run, check, and undo flows.
toast.retry_unavailable_description: DIVE could not find the last user message to resend.

auth.title: Authentication error
auth.body: Check your API key or login permission. Raw: {{message}}
auth.hints: Verify the key is correct.|Reconnect the provider in Settings.

rate_limit.title: Rate limit reached
rate_limit.body: The provider rate limit was reached. Raw: {{message}}
rate_limit.hints: Wait and retry.|Switch models in Settings or check the provider quota.|Split the task into smaller steps if needed.

network.title: Network error
network.body: Check your network connection or firewall. Raw: {{message}}
network.hints: Confirm internet access.|If behind a proxy/VPN, ask an admin to allow the API domains.

assistant_length.title: Response was cut off
assistant_length.body: The model reached its output limit before finishing the response.
assistant_length.hints: Retry with a shorter response request.|If this happened during plan generation, use compact JSON regeneration.

tool_blocked.title: Blocked by safety policy
tool_blocked.body: DIVE blocked a risky or out-of-project operation. Raw: {{message}}
tool_blocked.hints: Make sure the command stays inside the project folder.|Break risky commands into safer smaller steps.

verify_fail.title: Verification failed
verify_fail.body: Review the check output and adjust the step or test command. Raw: {{message}}
verify_fail.hints: Read stdout/stderr first.|Undo the step and make the task more specific if needed.

unknown.title: Error
unknown.hints: Read the raw message and retry.
